comment: URLs driving the topic-stability A/B experiment (rigor-pass §2 for 2TS-500). Each URL is summarized twice via /link with dry_run:true — once with topic_priors:true (the model sees the active corpus slug list) and once with topic_priors:false (the model coins slugs freely). Edit this list to expand the run; the driver script reads it from disk on every invocation so the run is fully reproducible.
